items.title: Podcast: Federal Reserve Holds the Line on Rates
items.description: Fed Chair Jerome Powell signals reluctance about a rate cut at the central bank’s next meeting in September. Plus: Hershey trimmed its annual outlook to reflect higher projected tariff expenses. SoFi Technologies plans a public offering of $1.

items.title: Stocks to Watch Recap: Freeport-McMoran, Hershey, Palo Alto, Starbucks
items.description: ↘️ Freeport-McMoran (FCX): Shares in the mining company, a large producer of copper, slid 9.5% Wednesday after the Trump administration outlined new tariffs related to the industrial metal. ↗️ Hershey (HSY): The chocolate maker trimmed its annual outlook to reflect higher projected tariff expenses.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops After Fed Powell Comments; Meta, Microsoft Soar On Earnings (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index was flat after the Fed interest rate decision. Nvidia stock rallied on a price-target hike.

items.title: How To Retire In 2025 On Dividends
items.description: Ready to retire? Read more on how those preparing for retirement can develop a portfolio of dividend stocks.
